overview: Yashraj Dance Studio website for Tingre Nagar, Pune — featuring online enquiry form, WhatsApp chat widget, photo gallery with admin upload capabilities, and secure admin panel for managing photos across all site sections.
features: Online enquiry form with backend storage and WhatsApp notification link
Floating WhatsApp chat widget with business hours display
Photo gallery with lightbox viewer and filter tabs
Admin panel with secure login for photo management
Photo upload to hero, gallery, services, facilities, and testimonials sections
Drag-and-drop photo upload with progress indicator
13 content sections: Hero, About, Services, Testimonials, Gallery, Contact, FAQ, and more
